## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services for Level AI's organic growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-driven content creation, focusing on SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to boost organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Services include a 6-8 week strategy sprint followed by 12-month growth execution, publishing 5-10 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [GrowthX's platform uses AI workflows for efficient, high-quality content creation, fact-checking, and deep research](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Clients see up to 60%+ LLM referral traffic with higher conversion rates compared to traditional search](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

## Topics

### Level AI's Current Situation

  - [B2B company with long sales cycles, focusing on pipeline generation and lead acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Small growth team with resource limitations](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Aiming to optimize organic traffic as one of several lead generation levers](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Seeking to increase brand visibility for long-term benefits](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end agency partner with proprietary AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Services: Content strategy, creation, and CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Focus: Driving high-intent organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Team: Includes industry experts (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Process: 6-8 week strategy sprint + 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Output: 5-10 articles/week, not limited to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### GrowthX's Technology

  - [AI workflows for content creation, leveraging multiple APIs (e.g., SEMrush)](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

  - [Persona creation across target industry verticals](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Topic cluster approach for keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Ramp: Created vendor database and expense category tool](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

  - [Town: Developed entire blog with focus on accounting accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/AEn7PKxocX_jEz1cm6TvtXich_mSPR3z?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
